pi_items.source: Task description which explicitly instructs installing the 'Contact Form 7' plugin, and export scripts matching the slug 'contact-form-7'.
Task description which explicitly instructs creating a contact form titled 'General Inquiry Form'.
Task description which explicitly instructs creating a new Page titled 'Contact Us'.
Task description which explicitly specifies configuring the form's Mail settings so that submissions are sent To: 'communications@greenvalley.org'.
Task description which explicitly lists exactly these four options for the dropdown field.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions explicitly direct the agent to install the 'contact-form-7' plugin, create a form named 'General Inquiry Form' with an email destination of 'communications@greenvalley.org', configure a dropdown with options 'Media Inquiry', 'Volunteer Application', 'General Question', and 'Partnership Opportunity', and embed it in a page named 'Contact Us'. These synthetic parameters exactly match the metadata claims.
